mentions.note: At $16 level; Cramer says if you like new EV makers, Rivian is the one to be in (better than Lucid), but Cramer doesn't personally like either.
Warming up after last quarter was good; Cramer surprised; wife considering purchase; looks like they'll make it; stock higher if they execute.
Seventh-largest US IPO (Nov 2021 at $78); ran to $179 in week, fell below $20 by May 2022. Now $15. Nightmare scenario coinciding with market top; warns of mega-IPO risk.
R2 launch last week but stock stalling despite recent pivot to lifestyle brand and insider buying. Losing too much money; not going to buy here.
Raised $1.2B selling 75M shares at $15.50, far below the $20 print — a deep-in-the-hole deal that signals supply strain.
